data.body: PASS-2 verification note (read-only review artifact): findings 7 and 8 cite the close-gate signing call as transition.py:393-396 / 362-396, but in this snapshot the sign_manifest call site is at src/rebar/_commands/transition.py:465-468 (lines 393-396 are unrelated cascade-error text). The substantive signing.py citations (docstring 19-25, _canonical_payload 188-201, compute_signature 204-206, PAYLOAD_VERSION 53-56) are accurate.
